story.core_message_de: Rückblick auf einen Glasbau-Projekttag + Take-home für Schott.
story.core_message_en: Recap of a glass construction project day + take-home for Schott.

splat_world.prompt_en: Abstract dark void with glowing constellation points suggesting facade glass panels and data nodes, subtle depth, minimalist, no furniture, cinematic space for QR panel and persona graph
splat_world.negative_prompt: kitchen, office, daylight window, construction site clutter
splat_world.camera_notes: qr_panel anchor floating at comfortable reading distance

image_prompts.prop_notes: QR code 3D prop; persona node constellation with glass/facade motif

environment.style_hint: abstract stars, persona graph, technical nodes

lines.text: Du hast Markus Weber fünf Minuten lang erlebt.
echeon, CHECKION, AUDION — ein Glasbau-Projekttag aus seiner Perspektive.
Scanne den Code — dein Report für Schott wartet.
